descFull: A project-director agent that drives your Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode to plan, build, review, govern & ship software like a real dev team — runnable code + a delivery proof. Brings no model of its own.项目总监 Agent:驱动你已登录的 Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode,像真实开发团队那样规划、编码、评审、治理、交付,交还可运行代码。
